scripts.cf:deploy: NITRO_PRESET=cloudflare-pages nuxt build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.cf:preview: NITRO_PRESET=cloudflare-pages nuxt build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --branch preview
scripts.db:migrate: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply triage-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:prod: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply triage-db --remote
